title: Junior Investment Banker at Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates
company: Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates:
Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aditya Birla Finance Asia Pacific Associates!
